CustomField.description: Calculated by Customizable Rollups. Do not edit manually. The count of won Opportunities closed in the last N days related to this Account. Uses the Won Opportunities for Hard Credit filter group. The value of N is configured in NPPatch Settings | Donations | Donor Statistics.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The number of gifts in the last N days for won Opportunities related to this Account.
CustomField.label: Number of Gifts Last N Days
